title: cyclosorus ellipticus
intro: Cyclosorus ellipticus, also known as the elliptical maiden hair fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus ellipticus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the fronds, then using them to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
